Rechnungen {{ rechnung_count }} Gutschriften {{ gutschrift_count }}

Liste

{{ "Gutschriftenübersicht" if is_credit_tab else "Rechnungsübersicht" }}

{% macro sort_link(col_id, label) %} {% set new_order = 'asc' if sort_col != col_id or order == 'desc' else 'desc' %} {% set arrow = ' ↑' if sort_col == col_id and order == 'asc' else (' ↓' if sort_col == col_id and order == 'desc' else '') %} {{ label }}{{ arrow }} {% endmacro %} {% if is_credit_tab %} {% endif %} {% for inv in invoices %} {% set display_amount = (0 - (inv.amount_gross or 0)) if is_credit_tab else inv.amount_gross %} {% if is_credit_tab %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
{{ sort_link('invoice_id', 'Rechnungs-Nr.') }} {{ sort_link('name', 'Name') }} {{ sort_link('amount_gross', 'Betrag (Brutto)') }} {{ sort_link('paid_sum_eur', 'Bezahlt') }} {{ sort_link('deviation_eur', 'Abweichung') }} {{ sort_link('status', 'Status') }} {{ sort_link('reminder_status', 'Mahnung') }} {{ sort_link('reminder_date', 'Mahnungsdatum') }}Zuordnung{{ sort_link('remark', 'Bemerkung') }}
{{ inv.invoice_id }} {{ inv.name or "—" }} {{ display_amount | format_eur }} {{ inv.paid_sum_eur | format_eur }} {{ inv.deviation_eur | format_eur }} {% set current_invoice_status = inv.status or "Offen" %} {% set invoice_status_style = status_inline_style(current_invoice_status, 'invoice') %} {% if inv.status_manual %} manuell {% endif %}
{% set current_reminder_status = inv.reminder_status or "" %} {% if inv.reminder_manual %} manuell {% endif %}
{{ inv.reminder_date | format_date if inv.reminder_date else "—" }} {% if inv.credit_target_invoice_id %} ✅ Zugeordnet Rechnung #{{ inv.credit_target_invoice_id }} {% else %} Nicht zugeordnet {% endif %} {% set current_remark = inv.remark or "" %}
